schema_note: This sheet is a set of generic precast-plank installation-practice details covering 5 different placement conditions, not one specific element instance -- each recorded as its own precast_plank_detail entry per spec section 9, with a description identifying the condition. Common note across all conditions: '* หรือเป็นไปตามข้อกำหนดการวางพื้นสำเร็จรูปของผู้ผลิตโดยต้องไม่น้อยกว่า 0.05 ม.' (or per the precast manufacturer's own spec, minimum 0.05m bearing).

elements.description: interior SP-to-SP joint, topping concrete over both plank edges

reinforcing_mesh.note: เสริมพิเศษ Ø6mm@0.20 in topping
